name: Bocchi | ThiccGuitarHero
description:
Original Image before the nerf:

I’ll just call this Astroodragons version of Bocchi. I was gonna make two versions, one where it wouldn’t be so horny, and one where it is. But I’m gonna embrace it fully.

This is Bocchi-Chan, not known on the internet as GuitarThiccRo. Yea, Bocchi was not creative at all. GuitarThiccRo is a fairly popular account with an unknown person behind it. Well, not unknown for long as you found out. GuitarThiccRo is an interesting channel, as instead of using, I dunno, a fucking guitar or something? They use assclapping as an instrument. Yes, you heard (See) that right, assclapping. She makes it clap like fireworks, she’s done numerous rock covers of songs, using her colossal asscheeks as instruments.

Now you could be thinking, does this mean that she uses her ass in the band she’s in? I don’t even want to think about that.

Who knew one could make BocchiTheRock so beautiful. But, how much does one think her anxiety would affect her if someone found that out about her? I’d personally say it would literally make her faze from existence.
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
